description.content: Token management and login
Authenticate using an API key to obtain a JWT access token. The API key is passed in the X-ApiKey header. Tokens expire after 30 minutes.

header.description: (Required) StackHawk API key from Settings > API Keys

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

header.description: (Required) StackHawk API key from Settings > API Keys

description.content: Refresh an existing JWT access token before it expires.

The StackHawk Public API provides programmatic access to the StackHawk application and API security testing platform. Manage applications, environments, scan configurations, scan results, findings, repositories, teams, policies, and security reports. Authentication requires obtaining a JWT token via the /api/v1/auth/login endpoint using an API key from the StackHawk platform settings.

Contact Support:
 Email: support@stackhawk.com
